nits: last_seen_event_ids could grow unboundedly across consecutive polls if many events share the exact same boundary ms and high-water never advances — bounded in practice (single ms collisions) but worth a cap if a heavy bulk-import workspace ever exposes it
EVENTS_PAGE_CAP=50 silently truncates beyond 50 pages with no warning — pre-existing, not introduced by this fix
reviewer: opus-4.7 adversarial pass via Agent tool, post-fix
